message:
fix(wal): only absorb frames up to last commit boundary and detect ABA resets

Both refresh_state and rebuild_state_from_file now track the last
committed frame boundary. Incomplete transactions (frames after the
last commit marker) are excluded from the WAL state, preventing
partially-written transactions from becoming visible.

Also adds ABA detection: validates the on-disk header even when the
file size matches expected, catching WAL reset+reappend scenarios
where the file size returns to a previously-seen value but the
content has changed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
